title: Crashes and hangs with remote tables
key_bug_features: SELECT COUNT with remote tables causes crashes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ontime ("Year" INT, "Month" INT, "Day" INT, "Event" VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO ontime ("Year", "Month", "Day", "Event") VALUES (2023, 1, 15, 'New Year Celebration');
INSERT INTO ontime ("Year", "Month", "Day", "Event") VALUES (2023, NULL, 20, 'Random Event');
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Year") FROM ontime WHERE "Month" IS NOT NULL;
